rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.3715, which governs collection and reporting of demographic information for educational assistance program participants.
quote: The comptroller, in collaboration with the agency and the certified educational assistance organizations, shall collect and report demographic information regarding each participating child.
_note: No overlap between proposed change (property tax homestead exemption) and rule text (demographic reporting for education program).
